interpretation: Single proof-of-concept unit. Effects are local and negligible at regional scale.
Small field array. Local SST peak reduction may become detectable with careful monitoring.
Coastal experimental corridor. Possible regional heat-stress reduction begins to appear in model.
Large upwelling-zone deployment. Meaningful regional improvement possible under optimistic assumptions.
Basin-scale experimental infrastructure. Strong regional signal possible; risk index growing significantly.
Very large deployment. Saturation begins; marginal benefit declines; ecological, governance, and public-trust risks become dominant.
